---
name: 💡 Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement

## 💡 Feature Description
A clear description of the feature you'd like to see.

## 🎯 Problem it Solves
What problem does this feature address?

## 🖼️ Mockups / References
Any visual references, links, or mockups.

## 📊 Priority
- [ ] Nice to have
- [ ] Important
- [ ] Critical

## 📝 Additional Context
Any other context or notes.
